title: Achievement (v1)
description: A single milestone achievement loaded from data/achievements/<id>.json. An achievement unlocks the moment the player's tracked statistic (condition) reaches its threshold. The loader tolerates unknown properties (AGENTS.md §11).

id.description: Unique achievement id, also used as the persisted key on the player record.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the ACHIEVEMENTS command.

description.description: Short flavour description of how the achievement is earned.

condition.description: The player statistic tracked toward this achievement: total_kills (cumulative mob kills) or level (character level).

threshold.description: The value the condition must reach for the achievement to unlock.
